settings.title: Do More With JumpSport Rebounder Trampolines
settings.copy: From Barre Workouts to HIIT training, elevate your workouts with the low-impact and instability benefits of a JumpSport Rebounder Trampoline. Designed for both club and in-home trampoline use, the smooth bouncing elastic cords are ideal for active kids through active aging adults!

settings.title: Patented Arched Legs
settings.copy: Unlike traditional rebounders, JumpSport’s patented arched legs provide unmatched stability and safety, preventing tipping and ensuring a secure workout experience. They also allow multiple trampolines to be stacked easily.

settings.title: Adjustable Tension EnduroLast™ Elastic Cords
settings.copy: Customize your workout intensity with JumpSport’s adjustable tension settings, allowing you to tailor the bounce to your fitness level and preferences. JumpSport EnduroLast™ Elastic Cords stretch 2x their resting length and have been rigorously tested and approved for millions of bounces.

settings.title: Edge-to-Edge Workouts
settings.copy: Extended lay-flat mats allow you to use the whole surface of your rebounder, making prone exercises more comfortable and giving you extra space for more diverse maneuvers.

settings.title: The Most Innovative Workouts
settings.copy: JumpSport offers the widest variety of programming, from high-intensity interval training (HIIT) to gentle, low-impact routines, catering to all fitness levels and goals. JumpSport Fitness TV is included with every purchase and exposes you to over 250 different ways of using your fitness trampoline. Try JumpSport Fitness TV

settings.title: Instructor Education Courses
settings.copy: Benefit from the best trampoline instructor education courses available, ensuring you get the most effective and safe workout guidance. Get started today with our online courses or contact us for in-person instruction for your team. Enroll Online Today

settings.title: Why Is JumpSport The Best Trampoline or Rebounder?
settings.copy: A rebounder, commonly known as a mini-trampoline, is a versatile piece of fitness equipment originally designed for low-impact cardiovascular workouts. But what sets JumpSport apart from the rest?

settings.title: Durability and Quality
settings.copy: Built with high-quality materials and superior craftsmanship, JumpSport trampolines are designed to last, providing you with a reliable fitness tool for years to come.

settings.title: Patented Safety Features
settings.copy: With features like patented arched legs, extended and enhanced mats, and the smoothest bouncing adjustable tension elastic cords, JumpSport prioritizes your safety, reducing the risk of injury during workouts.

settings.title: Premium Elastic
settings.copy: Years of testing went into our selection of elastic cords. Our EnduroLast Elastic Cords stretch longer, last longer, and provide a more forgiving bounce than any other bungee trampoline.

settings.title: Unmatched Warranty
settings.copy: We stand by our products so you don’t have to worry. From a lifetime warranty on the frame to 4 years for our 4-knot EnduroLast cords, you can be confident that your JumpSport will continue to perform.

settings.title: Why Does JumpSport Cost More Than Other Rebounders On Amazon?
settings.copy: Investing in a JumpSport Fitness Trampoline means investing in quality, durability, and a superior workout experience. Here’s why it’s worth the extra cost:

settings.title: More Gentle Bounce
settings.copy: Bungee cords provide a deeper, more absorbing bounce, which is much easier on the joints compared to the harder impact of metal springs.

settings.title: Virtually Silent
settings.copy: Bungee cords are significantly quieter than steel springs, making them perfect for home use without disturbing others.

settings.title: Enhanced Comfort
settings.copy: The smoother bounce of bungee rebounders slows your body down more gradually, making it more comfortable to bounce and decreasing your recovery time between workouts.

settings.title: Highly Durable
settings.copy: Bungee cords tend to last longer and require less maintenance than steel springs, providing a more reliable and long-lasting workout experience.

settings.title: Why Are Bungee Rebounders Better Than Spring Rebounders?
settings.copy: Steel springs can be noisy and offer a harsher bounce. JumpSport’s EnduroLast Elastic Cords offer several advantages over traditional steel spring rebounders:

settings.title: Increased Stability
settings.copy: The arched design offers greater stability, reducing the risk of tipping over during vigorous workouts. This makes it safer, especially for high-intensity exercise.

settings.title: Easier Mounting and Dismounting
settings.copy: Wider legs reduce the risk of the trampoline tipping when getting on or off of the trampoline. Straight leg trampolines may flip up if the frame is stepped on.

settings.title: Efficient Stacking
settings.copy: JumpSport’s unique leg design allows for multiple trampolines to stack easily for efficient storage.

settings.title: More Versatile Workouts
settings.copy: You can use the stable frame for push-ups, dips, planks, and more. The trampoline also stands up on edge easily, providing you with a portable barre or stability device when doing balance exercises.

settings.copy: Fitness trampolines with arched legs provide several benefits over straight legs:
